title: Missing-field validation returns 422, not 400
evidence: main.py:21-24 BookIn uses Pydantic Field(min_length=1); test_books.py:50-65 assert status 422. REQUIREMENTS R9 how_to_verify cites 400.
suggestion: Acceptable — 422 Unprocessable Entity is FastAPI's standard validation code and satisfies the 'rejected' intent; no change needed.

title: SQLite artifact books.db committed into the run archive
evidence: books.db present in run_dir (12288 bytes) alongside source; created during the agent's local verification run.
suggestion: Harmless — .gitignore already lists build artifacts; the DB is regenerated on startup.

title: Heuristic maintainability (0.27) and idiomatic (0.42) scores are low despite clean code
evidence: scores.json maintainability=0.268, idiomatic=0.42 (haiku scorer); code is a 167-line two-module app with docstrings, DI factory, and no lint issues (code_quality=0.83).
suggestion: Scorer heuristic artifact on very small codebases, not a code defect — no action.
